title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Allcargo Logistics - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Allcargo Logistics - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Allcargo Logistics family as a Distribution Manager in Jabalpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Allcargo Logistics:
Allcargo Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in WMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Allcargo Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
